code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  "0"
end

let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
let n = string.len(line1)
mut i = 0
mut start = -1
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line1, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(line1, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(line1, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if v > t
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
